titles.en: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Ali Ibn Atiyyah

text: ه عن عليّ بن عطيّة فقد رويته عن أبي- رحمه اللّه- عن سعد بن عبد اللّه، عن أحمد بن محمّد بن عيسى، عن علي بن حسّان، عن علي بن عطيّة الأصمّ الحنّاط الكوفيّ‌.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Everything in this book that is narrated from Ali ibn Atiyyah has been transmitted by me from my father - may Allah (swt) have mercy on him - from Sad ibn Abdullah, from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn Isa, from Ali ibn Hassan, from Ali ibn Atiyyah Al-Asam Al-Hannat Al-Kufi.
